prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Type 4 EA831 2.0L flat-four** (from the VW 411/412E) with a **Mahle forged pistons (8.5:1 compression)** and **Schrick 284° camshafts** for high-RPM power, paired with a **Kugelfischer mechanical fuel injection system** (originally used in the Porsche 911S) for precise fuel delivery at elevated boost levels.

Forced induction via a **Garrett T25 turbocharger (P/N 465302-5001S)** with a **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold** (fabricated by **Schmidt Motorsport**), feeding into a **Supersprint 60mm downpipe** and a **Sebring 2.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system** with **resonated center section** to reduce drone while maintaining flow.

Suspension overhaul with **Bilstein B14 coilovers (PSS9 variant, 412-specific valving)** and **Eibach Pro-Kit springs (-30mm drop)**, paired with **Meyle HD control arms (P/N 100 405 0015/HD)** and **Powerflex polyurethane bushings (P/N PFF80-601)** for improved chassis rigidity and cornering precision.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (412-specific)** with **custom carbon fiber fender flares** (hand-laid by **Seibon Carbon**) and **extended steel rear quarter panels** to accommodate **17x9 ET15 BBS RS wheels (P/N 001 013 015)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (215/40R17)** for aggressive stance and grip.

Front bumper replacement with a **custom aluminum splitter** (fabricated by **APR Performance**) and **Hella Rallye 1000 driving lights (P/N 007790801)** mounted in a **custom aluminum mesh grille** (replacing the stock chrome unit) for a period-correct yet aggressive aesthetic.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SRD bucket seats (P/N 388.01.001)** mounted on **custom aluminum seat rails**, a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (P/N 00112010)** on a **NRG quick-release hub**, and a **full roll cage (6-point, TIG-welded by Safety Devices UK, P/N SD001-412)** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses (P/N ASM4214B)** for track use.
